level_signals: 3–7+ years of experience in community management, customer programs, customer education, operations, or related fields
Hourly rate $60–$80 USD, consistent with mid-senior contractor

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3–7+ years of experience in community management, customer programs, customer education, operations, or related fields.
Demonstrated experience building and scaling community programs, such as user groups, ambassador programs, advocacy initiatives, or community-led events.

An AI-native operator mindset and proven track record of using AI to plan, create, analyze, automate, and execute work. You should be able to articulate how AI has improved your productivity, quality, throughput, or business outcomes.
Strong program management and operational skills, including the ability to manage multiple initiatives simultaneously, build scalable processes, and drive projects from concept through execution.
Strong written communication and community engagement skills, with the ability to create experiences that foster participation, learning, and customer advocacy.
Comfortable working cross-functionally with Product, Marketing, Customer Success, Education, and other stakeholders.
Analytical and data-driven, with experience measuring program performance and using insights to guide decisions and investments.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience supporting Reddit communities, social engagement programs, or community growth initiatives on third-party platforms.
Familiarity with SaaS customer success, customer education, product adoption, or customer lifecycle programs.
Experience using Airtable; experience designing and building apps in Airtable is a strong plus.
Passion for AI, automation, and helping customers adopt new ways of working.
Comfortability with a flexible schedule (we have international events that will sometimes need support).

scope.surface: Airtable Community programs — Builder Crews (user groups), community engagement initiatives, community operations, Reddit and social channels
primary_metrics_inferred: User group program scale and participation
core_responsibilities: Recruiting, onboarding, and supporting Builder Crew leaders
Developing playbooks, templates, and operational processes for local events
Partnering with internal teams on event promotion, measurement, and follow-up
Supporting engagement initiatives across Airtable Community and social channels
Expanding Airtable's presence and participation on Reddit and other community platforms
Identifying and amplifying customer success stories, best practices, and AI use cases
Managing program operations, documentation, reporting, and workflows
Identifying opportunities to automate manual work and improve operational efficiency

green_flags: Clear north star metric stated (AI WAUs / AI feature adoption)
Specific program scope (Builder Crews, Reddit, community ops) — not vague
12-month contract with full-time hours (40 hr/week) gives meaningful runway
Equal opportunity employer statement with accommodations process outlined
red_flags: This is a contractor role, not a full-time employee position — no benefits mentioned
12-month duration is fixed; no mention of conversion path to FTE
International events may require occasional off-hours availability (flagged as nice-to-have but real operational ask)
Visa sponsorship status not addressed for a contractor engagement
